name: UBA : User Access at Unusual Times
notes: Indicates that users are successfully authenticating at times that are unusual for your network, as defined by "UBA : Unusual Times, %" building blocks.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
when an event matches any of the following UBA : Unusual Times, Evening, UBA : Unusual Times, Overnight
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Access at Unusual Times on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : Unusual Times, Evening, UBA : Unusual Times, Overnight
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Access at Unusual Times
